GpuProjectExec: expr=[brand_id@0 as brand_id, brand@1 as brand, ext_price@2 as ext_price]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@2 DESC, i_brand_id@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[ext_price@2 DESC, i_brand_id@3 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_brand_id@1 as brand_id, i_brand@0 as brand, sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@2 as ext_price, i_brand_id@1 as i_brand_id]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_ext_sales_price@2 as ss_ext_sales_price, i_brand_id@0 as i_brand_id, i_brand@1 as i_brand]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 4]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=i_manager_id@3 = 28, projection=[0, 1, 2]
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961

                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961

                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
